prompt: Create a realistic high-angle elevator selfie style photo of a young adult woman as an off-duty Spider-Man. She is standing on glossy gray marble tile flooring in a modern elevator or apartment hallway, photographed from above with a wide phone-camera perspective. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a centered square blur censor block. She has messy shoulder-length dark wavy hair and wears a tight red-and-blue Spider-Man crop top with long sleeves, webbing pattern, raised black spider emblem on the chest, and subtle glossy superhero suit texture. Add black backpack straps over both shoulders, loose black baggy sweatpants, and clean white sneakers. One hand rests in a pocket while the other hand holds a red Spider-Man mask by her side. The environment has beige elevator walls, dark doorway edges, muted indoor lighting, and realistic shadows and reflections on the stone floor. Compose the image vertically, candid and casual, like a normal selfie transformed into a realistic off-duty superhero portrait, with cinematic detail, natural proportions, and no text.
